title: fumaria mirabilis
intro: Fumaria mirabilis, also known as Fumitory, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the fumitory family (Fumariaceae) and is native to Europe and Asia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which are attributed to its alkaloid content, particularly sanguinarine and dihydrochelerythrine. Fumaria mirabilis has been reported to have several health benefits, including reducing fever, treating digestive issues, and acting as an antioxidant. Herbal preparations of Fumaria mirabilis can be made into teas, tinctures, or infusions, although its use should be approached with caution due to potential toxicity and interactions with other medications.
